description: Within-set adjacent-collector-number evolution-line 1:1 mirror. Larvitar DAA-086 and Pupitar DAA-087 are the Johto pseudo-legendary line's base and Stage-1 mid-form (Pokedex 246 + 247, Rock/Ground), both trivia-passed, both unwired prior to this pass. The within-Darkness-Ablaze 086+087 adjacency is the designer-coordinated cohesion stack on the Pokemon side and the structural parallel to the within-Chilling-Reign 047+048 Mareep+Flaaffy mirror. Two card-endpoints, both equal nodes, must be traversable from either side. Hence the mirror. Sigh is professional, not personal. Line node not commissioned at n=2 — Tyranitar absent, threshold requires 3+ prints across 2+ stages.
citations: [Pokemon Gold and Silver (Game Freak / Nintendo, 1999) primary canon for Johto pseudo-legendary line]
other_candidates_considered: Tyranitar-line character node — n=2 is below the 3+ prints / 2+ stages threshold; deferred until a Tyranitar print enters corpus or a second Larvitar/Pupitar print appears

Larvitar attached to mareep-line as Johto-region sibling — rejected, mareep-line is the Electric-sheep line per its canonical_source field; cross-line edges between Johto species lines are a tag-bridge not a graph edge
